zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Elizabeth Fenne於1575年10月30日出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓時，她的父親John Fenne21歲，母親Joane Elizabeth Collett30歲。她於1593年與Thomas G. Claiborne在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1668年在英國英格蘭肯特可雷福德享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Elizabeth Fenne于1575年10月30日出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓时，她的父亲John Fenne21岁，母亲Joane Elizabeth Collett30岁。她于1593年与Thomas G. Claiborne在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1668年在英国英格兰肯特可雷福德享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fenne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fenn
meanings: English: topographic name in south-east England for someone who lived in a low-lying marshy area, from Middle English fen(ne) ‘fen, marsh’ (Old English fenn).
South German: topographic name from Old High German fenni, Middle Low German and Old Frisian fenne ‘bog’. Compare Fehn .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 馮, see   Feng   1.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Elizabeth Fenne was born on 30 October 1575, in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Fenne, was 21 and her mother, Joane Elizabeth Collett, was 30. She married Thomas G. Claiborne in 1593, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1668, in Crayford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Elizabeth Fenne est née le 30 octobre 1575, à Long Stratton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fenne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joane Elizabeth Collett, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas G. Claiborne en 1593, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1668, à Crayford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 93 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Elizabeth Fenneが1575年10月30日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオンで生まれた時，父John Fenneは21歳，母Joane Elizabeth Collettは30歳であった。1593年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでThomas G. Claiborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1668年にイギリスイギリスケントクレイフォードで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Elizabeth Fenne(이)가 1575년 10월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Fenne(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Elizabeth Collett(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1593년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Thomas G. Claiborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1668년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크라이퍼드에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Elizabeth Fenne родилась 30 октября 1575 г. в местности лонг страттон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Fenne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joane Elizabeth Collett, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas G. Claiborne в 1593 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1668 г. в местности креифорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 93 лет.
